text:
```python
# Given 2D list
data = [[1, 2], [3, 4], [5, 6]]

# Initialize column sums
col_sums = [0, 0]

# Compute column-wise sums
for row in data:
    for i in range(len(row)):
        col_sums[i] += row[i]

# Print the column-wise sums as the last line of stdout
print(col_sums)
```
